urdu transliteration text:
Tha Ye Bano Ka BayaanKis Ko Doon Ub LoriyanThis was Bano’s lamentation,for whom shall I sing lullabies
Hazrat Ali Asghar (a.s.) - A Mothers Lamentation

english translation text: Dhoondthi Phirti Hai MaderHai Mera Asger KahanThe mother kept searching profusely and saying 'where is my Asghar?'

urdu transliteration text: Tera Jhoola Jal Gaya Aey Mere Tishna DahaanYou cradle is now burnt, O’ my thirsty child

english translation text: Khoon Bhara Kurta Tera Haey Vo Bhi Chin GayaYour blood- soaked shirt, even that was plundered (by the enemy)
Ab Jeeyun Kis Kay Sahare Paas Mere Kya RahaHow can I live without a reminder of you, what do I have left now?
Zindagi Hai Raaegaan Umr Bhar Hoon Noha KhawanLife is now worthless, I will mourn for you the rest of my days
Dhoondthi Phirti Hai Mader Hai Mera Asger KahanThe mother kept searching profusely and saying 'where is my Asghar?'

urdu transliteration text: Haey Vo Nazuk Gala Theen Din Say Khushq ThaThat delicate neck, parched for three days

english translation text: Bhar Kay Mojay Teer Nay Wo Is Qadar Zakhmi KiyaThe tip of the flying arrow, inflicted an injury so grave
Thar Huwi Khoon Say Zabaan Le Sake Na HichkiyanBlood drowned the tongue, you could not breathe your last
Dhoondthi Phirti Hai Mader Hai Mera Asger KahanThe mother kept searching profusely and saying 'where is my Asghar?'
Khaali Jhoola Daikh Ker Aey Mere Noor-e-NazarSeeing the empty cradle, O’ the light of my eyes

urdu transliteration text: Aankh Faryradi Hai Meri Aur Rota Hai JigarMy eyes tear up, and my heart weeps

english translation text: So gaye Ho Tum Kahan Chayn Paaey Kaisay MaaWhere are you sleeping, how can I find some solace
Dhoondthi Phirti Hai Mader Hai Mera Asger KahanThe mother kept searching profusely and saying 'where is my Asghar?'

urdu transliteration text: Mei Musafir Shaam Ki Khatm Hud Araam KiI am a captive goingto Sham, my rest is over

english translation text: Qaid Ho Ker Jaa Rahi Hoon Gard Hai Alaam KiI am going as a prisoner, the dust is all that is left
Bandh Chuki Hai Reesma Hum Kaha Aur Tum Kaha The ropes have bound (our hands), we are so far apart, where am I and where are you
Dhoondthi Phirti Hai Mader Hai Mera Asger KahanThe mother kept searching profusely and saying 'where is my Asghar?'

urdu transliteration text: Meer Kya Rehan Kya Jis Nay Ye Noha SunnaNot only Meer and Rehan, buy whoever hears this Noha
Ashk Ankhon Say Baha Ker Us Nay Ro Ro Ker Katha Cries Tears of Blood and Says
Haay Vo Asghar Ki Maa Uff Bo Tera ImtihaanO The Mother of Asghar, You Went Through Difficult Trials

english translation text: Dhoondthi Phirti Hai Mader Hai Mera Asger KahanThe mother kept searching profusely and saying 'where is my Asghar?'

urdu transliteration text: Hzt Ali Asghar as (A Mothers Lamentation)
english translation text: Jaam Ashkon Kay Peeyo Aaj Ki Shab So RahoUmr Lag Jaey Humari Tum Ko Tum Jeetay RahoQuench your thirst with tears, fall asleep on this nightMay my life end so you can live on

urdu transliteration text: Hzt Ali Asghar as (A Mothers Lamentation)
english translation text: Tum Pe Qurban Meri Jaan Aey Qaraar-e-Bay KasaanDhoondthi Phirti Hai Mader Hai Mera Asger KahanMy life be sacrificed for you, O my brave and lonely child Your mother is wandering here and there searching, O’ where is my Asghar
